variables.defaultValue: moonlit immortal woman emerging from a vertical painted scroll
suggestions: red-robed sword heroine breaking through an ancient hanging scroll

variables.label: Temperament
variables.defaultValue: cold, restrained, melancholic, and graceful
suggestions: bright, sharp, decisive, and cinematic
soft, hopeful, elegant, and story-rich

variables.label: Emergence Action
variables.defaultValue: half stepping out of the scroll while one hand reaches toward the viewer
suggestions: flying forward with robe and hair still connected to the painted inner world
one foot outside the scroll, sleeves and floral vines crossing the frame boundary

variables.label: Costume Palette
variables.defaultValue: ice blue, silver white, pale gold embroidery, translucent silk sleeves
suggestions: deep red, warm gold, cream fabric, dark ink shadows

variables.label: Scroll World
variables.defaultValue: moonlit pavilion, ink mist, pale magnolia branches, distant water reflection

peach blossom garden, water pavilion, low morning haze

variables.label: Foreground Elements

suggestions: falling maple leaves, sword glint, torn paper edges, and layered fog
peach blossoms, silk ribbons, small birds, and light floral mist
